    Between Thought and Reality by Maeglin_Yedi

    • Implied/Referenced Suicide
    Summary

    Harry's life post final battle isn't what he expected it would be, and then he dies, just like that.

    He gets a second chance but forgets to read the fine-print, and ends up somewhere in the distant past while his body suddenly looks quite differently.

    Now he's stuck as a teenager attending Hogwarts again, where he encounters an old enemy, and surprise, it's not Tom Riddle. All Harry has to do now is survive long enough to build a life for himself that's actually worth living.

    Summary

    When the battle in the department of mysteries heads south, Harry finds herself flung backwards in time to 1942, where Tom Riddle is a prefect in his fifth year. Armed with this knowledge, but little else, Harry desperately tries to find a way home and for once in her life not screw it up. Tom, for his own part, wonders when Harry Evans will head back to the mothership.

    Summary

    Harry falls back through time, in the beginning of her fifth year at Hogwarts.

    She's determined to get back without disrupting the timeline. But after she runs into a young Tom Riddle in Diagon Alley, she realizes that there's only so much hiding she can do, especially when she meets him again later, at the orphanage that took her in.

    • Pureblood Culture (Harry Potter)
    • Believed dead Harriet Potter
    Summary

    Sirius can't leave his goddaughter Harriet alone in the destroyed cottage, it's too dangerous, even if the Headmaster is probably on his way right now. But he also can't wait any longer, Peter's apparition trail is starting to fade, and he needs to catch the traitorous rat, needs to kill him.

    But maybe there's a way.

    Sirius' parents are dead, and Grimmauld Place is empty.

    - "This is Harriet Potter, Dorea's blood," he said, watching his goddaughter, as Kreacher muttered something about mudbloods, "you will bring her to Grimmauld Place. You will treat her and care for her as if she was an heir of House Black."

     

    Ok, good, she'll be safe there, and as soon as I'm done, I'll immediately pick her up and bring her to my home in Worcestershire. -

     

    Harriet grows up with the Noble and Most Ancient House of Black. Well, really, with their portraits.

  5. Private Bookmark *

    Shedding Lionskin by BeaconHill

    Fandoms: Harry Potter - J. K. Rowling  
    • Teen And Up Audiences
    • No Archive Warnings Apply
    • Gen
    • Work in Progress

    09 Mar 2025

    Tags
    • No Archive Warnings Apply
    • Harry Potter & Severus Snape
    • Harry Potter & Nymphadora Tonks
    • Harry Potter
    • Severus Snape
    • Nymphadora Tonks
    • Narcissa Black Malfoy
    • Hogwarts Fifth Year
    • Disguised Harry Potter
    • Severus Snape Adopts Harry Potter
    • Slytherin Harry Potter
    • Dark Harry Potter
    • Trans Female Character
    • Female Harry Potter
    • Manipulative Harry Potter
    • Slytherin Politics
    • Gryffindor vs. Slytherin Rivalry
    • Mentor Severus Snape
    • Mentor Nymphadora Tonks
    • Trans Female Harry Potter
    Summary

    Harry Potter has honestly enjoyed his four years as a Gryffindor. He loves the friends, the camaraderie, the cozy feeling of Gryffindor Tower – oh, and getting to be the Boy-who-Lived, wizarding superstar, isn't bad either. The House of Lions helped him to become the friendly, warm, fun-loving kid he is today – and set aside his past as the terror of Little Whinging Primary, the cold, angry boy who hurt Muggles with magic.

    But it's not that simple. He hates being in danger every year. He hates the way he underperforms in classes. He can't quite let go of the manipulative ways of his childhood, still lurking beneath the surface. And after watching Lord Voldemort murder Cedric Diggory, he's absolutely petrified. He wants out. He wants to stop being Harry Potter.

    When the wards protecting Harry fail, Professor Dumbledore offers him the chance to go into hiding: to adopt a new name and a new face, placed with the family of an Order member so he can return to Hogwarts incognito. Harry accepts, and lets his childhood self come rushing back in the persona of the cunning, dark, and ever so Slytherin Miss Iolanthe Snape.

    She finds it all too easy to change. The question is, will she ever want to change back?

    Language:

    Words:
